job_description:
# Healthcare Data Quality Analyst
Company: ATC
Source: Indeed
Employment type: Contract
Checked: April 27, 2026
URL: https://www.indeed.com/viewjob?jk=29523d1fbbec5678

## Highlights
- Contract role in healthcare data quality.
- Focus on SQL/T-SQL validation, standardization, dashboards, and governance.
- Emphasizes root-cause analysis and cross-system data quality assessment.
strengths: Very strong data quality and SQL alignment
Governance and dashboards mentioned in posting

replacements.replace: Healthcare Data Quality Analyst | SQL | Data Governance | Reporting Quality
replacements.find: ETL Analyst | Healthcare Data Analyst | Data Quality & Warehouse Analyst

replacements.replace: Healthcare Data & ETL Analyst with 7+ years of experience validating, standardizing, and reconciling enterprise data across healthcare reporting environments. Deep hands-on expertise in advanced SQL, ETL validation, source-to-target testing, data quality controls, and root-cause analysis. Strong fit for roles that require data quality routines, governance support, and stakeholder-facing reporting accuracy.
replacements.find: Healthcare Data & ETL Analyst with 7+ years of experience validating, reconciling, and delivering trusted enterprise data across healthcare (payer), banking, retail, and e-commerce domains. Deep hands-on expertise in advanced SQL, ETL validation, source-to-target testing, data quality, data warehousing, and production data support. Currently extending core skills into Snowflake, Databricks, Azure Data Factory, and Python to support cloud modernization and AI-ready data pipelines. Proven partner to engineering, QA, and business stakeholders—translating mapping documents and business rules into validation frameworks that protect reporting accuracy, regulatory compliance, and downstream analytics readiness.

replacements.replace: Source-to-target testing, record counts, duplicate / null / referential / business-rule checks, automated validation design, root-cause analysis, defect triage, data quality standards
replacements.find: Source-to-target testing, record counts, duplicate / null / referential / business-rule checks, root-cause analysis, defect triage

replacements.replace: Power BI, Tableau, Excel (advanced – pivots, lookups, Power Query), data quality dashboards and reporting
replacements.find: Power BI, Tableau, Excel (advanced – pivots, lookups, Power Query)

replacements.replace: Built a library of 300+ reusable validation test cases from mapping documents and business rules—covering record counts, duplicates, nulls, referential integrity, and business-rule logic—to standardize data quality routines and improve issue prevention.
replacements.find: Built a library of 300+ reusable validation test cases from mapping documents and business rules—covering record counts, duplicates, nulls, referential integrity, and business-rule logic—adopted across the QA team to standardize testing and reduce ramp time for new analysts.

replacements.replace: Contributed to data quality and reporting accuracy initiatives that reduced post-release data hotfixes by ~25% and improved stakeholder trust in dashboards, performance metrics, and downstream KPIs.
replacements.find: Contributed to data quality and reporting accuracy initiatives that reduced post-release data hotfixes by ~25% and improved stakeholder trust in payer-operations dashboards and downstream KPIs.

gaps: Posting is focused on immunization information systems rather than payer data
notes: Indeed contract target. Tailoring emphasizes data quality standards, SQL validation routines, dashboards, and governance support.
